message:
test(packs): comprehensive test coverage for 31 pack modules + fix traefik safe pattern bug

Add blocks_each_destructive_pattern, blocks_with_correct_severity,
all_safe_patterns_match, and unrelated_commands_no_match tests across
backup, containers, database, dns, email, loadbalancer, messaging,
monitoring, payment, storage, and system packs.

Fix real bug: traefik safe pattern `traefik-api-read` incorrectly
whitelisted curl DELETE/PUT/POST/PATCH requests to read-only API
endpoints (e.g. /api/routers). Added negative lookahead for
destructive HTTP methods.

793 pack tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
